breaking.title_zh: OpenAI发布GPT-5预览版，多模态能力大幅提升
breaking.title_en: OpenAI Releases GPT-5 Preview with Significant Multimodal Improvements
breaking.summary_zh: OpenAI正式发布GPT-5预览版本，新模型在图像理解、视频分析和语音交互方面实现突破性进展。API延迟降低40%，价格维持不变。
breaking.summary_en: OpenAI officially releases GPT-5 preview. The new model achieves breakthrough progress in image understanding, video analysis and voice interaction. API latency reduced by 40% while pricing remains unchanged.

breaking.title_zh: Anthropic完成新一轮融资，估值突破900亿美元
breaking.title_en: Anthropic Closes New Funding Round at $90B+ Valuation
breaking.summary_zh: Anthropic宣布完成由谷歌领投的新一轮融资，公司估值超过900亿美元。Claude 4 Enterprise版本同步上线，支持200万字上下文窗口。
breaking.summary_en: Anthropic announces new funding round led by Google, with company valuation exceeding $90B. Claude 4 Enterprise launches simultaneously, supporting 2M token context window.

breaking.title_zh: 谷歌首次证实：黑客已用AI发动真实零日漏洞攻击
breaking.title_en: Google Confirms: Hackers Used AI to Launch Real Zero-Day Attacks
breaking.summary_zh: 谷歌周一发布报告，首次确认犯罪黑客使用AI大模型发现了一个此前未知的零日漏洞，并差点发动大规模攻击。这是安全界首次捕获到AI参与的真实网络攻击代码，包含大量教学性注释和AI幻觉特征。
breaking.summary_en: Google released a report confirming for the first time that criminal hackers used AI large models to discover a previously unknown zero-day vulnerability and nearly launched a large-scale attack. This is the first time AI-generated attack code has been captured in the wild.

breaking.title_zh: Anthropic估值破1.2万亿美元，收入超越OpenAI登顶AI新贵
breaking.title_en: Anthropic Valuation Hits $1.2 Trillion, Revenue Surpasses OpenAI
breaking.summary_zh: 2026年Q1全球大模型总收入约207亿美元，Anthropic以31.4%市场份额超越OpenAI的29%。公司年化营收达440亿美元，12个月净增350亿。Claude Code成为企业级开发工具首选，财富10强中8家为其客户。
breaking.summary_en: In Q1 2026, global LLM revenue was ~$20.7B. Anthropic captured 31.4% market share, surpassing OpenAI's 29%. Annualized revenue reached $44B with $35B net growth in 12 months. Claude Code is now the preferred enterprise dev tool.
breaking.source: 21世纪经济报道 / 新浪财经

breaking.summary_zh: 配置 API Key 后获取真实新闻

breaking.title_zh: 重生之我在AI时代当老板：让一群Agent互相PUA

daily.title_zh: 微软Copilot新增'深度研究'模式，可自主完成复杂调研
daily.title_en: Microsoft Copilot Adds 'Deep Research' Mode for Autonomous Complex Research
daily.excerpt_zh: 微软宣布Copilot新增深度研究功能，AI可自主规划研究路径、搜索多源信息并生成综合报告。首批面向Microsoft 365 Enterprise用户开放。
daily.excerpt_en: Microsoft announces Copilot deep research feature where AI can autonomously plan research paths, search multiple sources and generate comprehensive reports. First available to Microsoft 365 Enterprise users.

daily.title_zh: 欧盟AI法案实施细则正式生效，高风险AI系统面临合规大考
daily.title_en: EU AI Act Implementation Rules Take Effect, High-Risk AI Systems Face Compliance Test
daily.excerpt_zh: 欧盟AI法案实施细则今日正式生效，涵盖医疗、教育、招聘等8个高风险领域的企业必须在6个月内完成合规整改。违规最高可处全球营收7%罚款。
daily.excerpt_en: EU AI Act implementation rules take effect today. Enterprises in 8 high-risk areas including healthcare, education and recruitment must complete compliance rectification within 6 months. Maximum fine: 7% of global revenue.

daily.title_zh: Stability AI开源新一代视频生成模型Stable Video 3D
daily.title_en: Stability AI Open Sources Next-Gen Video Model Stable Video 3D
daily.excerpt_zh: Stability AI发布并开源Stable Video 3D模型，支持从单张图片生成360度可交互3D视频。模型参数量较前代减少50%，生成速度提升3倍。
daily.excerpt_en: Stability AI releases and open sources Stable Video 3D model, supporting 360-degree interactive 3D video generation from a single image. Model parameters reduced by 50% with 3x faster generation speed.

daily.title_zh: 字节跳动Seed团队发布音乐生成大模型，支持中英文歌词
daily.title_en: ByteDance Seed Team Releases Music Generation Model Supporting Chinese and English Lyrics
daily.excerpt_zh: 字节跳动Seed团队发布开源音乐生成大模型Seed-Music，支持通过文本提示生成完整歌曲，可处理中英文歌词，最长支持4分钟音频。
daily.excerpt_en: ByteDance Seed team releases open-source music generation model Seed-Music, supporting full song generation from text prompts with Chinese and English lyrics, up to 4 minutes of audio.

daily.title_zh: 英伟达H100供应量持续紧张，交货周期延长至52周
daily.title_en: Nvidia H100 Supply Remains Tight, Lead Time Extends to 52 Weeks
daily.excerpt_zh: 英伟达H100 GPU交货周期从36周进一步延长至52周，云厂商正在加速导入自研芯片和AMD MI300系列作为替代方案。
daily.excerpt_en: Nvidia H100 GPU lead time extends from 36 to 52 weeks. Cloud providers are accelerating adoption of in-house chips and AMD MI300 series as alternatives.

daily.title_zh: AI编程助手Cursor月活突破500万，企业版营收占比超60%
daily.title_en: AI Coding Assistant Cursor Hits 5M MAU, Enterprise Revenue Exceeds 60%
daily.excerpt_zh: AI编程工具Cursor宣布月活跃用户突破500万，其中企业版订阅收入占总营收60%以上。公司同时宣布B轮融资2亿美元，估值达15亿美元。
daily.excerpt_en: AI coding tool Cursor announces 5M monthly active users, with enterprise subscriptions accounting for over 60% of total revenue. Company also announces $200M Series B at $1.5B valuation.

daily.title_zh: 剂泰科技挂牌港交所，全球AI药物递送第一股首日高开175%
daily.title_en: Jitaitech Debuts on HKEX as First AI Drug Delivery Stock, Surges 175% on Day One
daily.excerpt_zh: 2026年5月13日，剂泰科技（7666.HK）在香港联交所主板正式挂牌上市，成为全球AI药物递送第一股。IPO定价10.50港元/股，募资总额超21亿港元，首日高开175%引爆港股。
daily.excerpt_en: On May 13, 2026, Jitaitech (7666.HK) officially listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange as the world's first AI drug delivery stock. IPO priced at HK$10.50 per share, raising over HK$2.1B, surging 175% on debut.
daily.source: 动脉新医药 / 新浪财经

daily.title_zh: 字节跳动豆包上线三档付费会员，国内AI助手进入商业化攻坚期
daily.title_en: ByteDance Doubao Launches Three-Tier Paid Membership, Domestic AI Assistants Enter Monetization Phase
daily.excerpt_zh: 字节跳动旗下AI助手豆包在苹果App Store上线三档付费会员测试选项，标志着国内生成式AI行业从'烧钱抢用户'的规模扩张阶段，正式迈入价值变现的商业化攻坚期。
daily.excerpt_en: ByteDance's AI assistant Doubao launched three-tier paid membership options on the App Store, marking the domestic generative AI industry's shift from user acquisition to monetization.
daily.source: 新浪财经 / 华尔街见闻

daily.title_zh: Anthropic洽购开发者工具公司Stainless，估值至少3亿美元
daily.title_en: Anthropic in Talks to Acquire Developer Tools Startup Stainless, Valued at $300M+
daily.excerpt_zh: 据《The Information》报道，Anthropic正就收购开发者工具初创公司Stainless进行深入谈判，收购金额至少为3亿美元。Stainless为Anthropic、OpenAI及谷歌等提供AI模型接入服务。
daily.excerpt_en: According to The Information, Anthropic is in advanced talks to acquire developer tools startup Stainless for at least $300M. Stainless provides AI model access services for Anthropic, OpenAI and Google.

daily.title_zh: 宇树科技发布全球首款量产版载人变形机甲，售价390万元起
daily.title_en: Unitree Releases World's First Mass-Produced Human-Carrying Transforming Mech, Starting at $3.9M
daily.excerpt_zh: 5月12日，宇树科技发布全球首款量产版载人变形机甲GD01，支持人形与四足双形态切换，载人后总重约500公斤，定位为民用交通工具，售价390万元起。2026年被视为人形机器人的量产元年。
daily.excerpt_en: On May 12, Unitree Technology released the world's first mass-produced human-carrying transforming mech GD01, supporting dual humanoid/quadruped modes. Total weight ~500kg, positioned as civilian transport, starting at $3.9M.
daily.source: 新浪财经 / 央视财经

daily.title_zh: 苹果正探索在App Store中引入AI智能体方案
daily.title_en: Apple Exploring AI Agent Integration in App Store
daily.excerpt_zh: 苹果正探索在App Store中引入人工智能智能体的方案，或将改变用户与应用的交互方式，为开发者提供新的AI能力分发渠道。
daily.excerpt_en: Apple is exploring plans to introduce AI agents into the App Store, potentially changing how users interact with apps and providing developers with new AI capability distribution channels.

daily.title_zh: 宁波发布'AI+制造'全场景开放创新行动方案，三年培育20个工业大模型
daily.title_en: Ningbo Releases 'AI+Manufacturing' Open Innovation Plan, Aiming for 20 Industrial LLMs in 3 Years
daily.excerpt_zh: 宁波正式发布《深化制造业数字化转型，打造'人工智能+制造'全场景开放创新高地行动方案(2026—2028年)》，力争三年培育20个工业垂类大模型，建设100个场景应用标志性项目。
daily.excerpt_en: Ningbo officially released an action plan for AI+manufacturing open innovation (2026-2028), aiming to cultivate 20 industrial vertical LLMs and build 100 landmark scenario application projects within three years.
daily.source: 衢州日报 / 新浪财经
